body:
## Working session summary

Implemented and pushed the fix for issue #1813.

PR #1815 is updated and ready: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/1815  
Commit: `055a1a0f`

The fix changes working-session summary detection so a visible `## Working session summary` heading alone no longer makes a comment “tool-generated.” Automated summaries now carry a hidden marker, while legacy automated summaries are still recognized by their footer. I also added a regression test for the Codex-authored summary case, updated related summary tests, added a changeset, and documented the incident under the issue case study artifacts.

Verification passed:
- `node tests/test-issue-1813-codex-summary-dedup.mjs`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run format:check`
- `npm test` with all 213 selected test files passing
- GitHub Actions run `25975906633` completed successfully
- Working tree is clean on `issue-1813-ab79cdd78da8`

References checked: GitHub REST docs for [working with comments](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/guides/working-with-comments) and [issues/comments](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/issues/issues).

---
